mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_query_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_query_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_query_log WHERE is_effective = true AND created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_query_log WHERE is_effective = false AND created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_query_log WHERE is_effective IS NULL AND created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
SELECT AVG(response_time_ms) FROM steering_query_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
